message:
fix: use bounded fresh context for SQLite ROLLBACK (#8854) (#8855)

In BEGIN IMMEDIATE flows (AddUserTokenDelta, IncrementUserCoins,
ClaimDailyBonus, oauth-state redeem), the defer used
`conn.ExecContext(ctx, "ROLLBACK")` with the same context passed to the
method. If the client disconnects or the request times out, that ctx is
cancelled; the subsequent ROLLBACK fails immediately, leaving the
transaction zombified on the pinned connection.

Adds `rollbackConn(conn)` helper that uses `context.Background()` bounded
by a 5-second `rollbackTimeout`, and applies it to all four sites. Build,
vet, and the existing store tests all pass. Helper colocated at the bottom
of the file alongside the audit/rewards methods it supports.

Credit @Pranjal6955 for the audit find.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
